channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s love story, from friendship bracelets to wedding rings
item.description: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce have officially tied the knot. The pop superstar and football champion were married Friday at Madison Square Garden, as confirmed by Swift’s publicist.

item.title: 150 people from 50 countries become US citizens at Mount Vernon on America’s 250th birthday
Prosecutors to lay out their case against the man accused of killing Charlie Kirk
